entryPoints.markdownDescription:
Files that each serve as an input to the bundling algorithm. Can be an array of paths or an object mapping output names to input paths.

When omitted, tsbuild auto-infers entry points from the `exports`, `bin`, `main`, or `module` fields in `package.json` by reverse-mapping output paths to source paths.

platform.description: Target platform. Auto-detected from tsconfig lib (DOM = browser, no DOM = node). Override if needed.

bundle.description: Whether to bundle source files together. When false, each file is output separately.

clean.description: Remove all files from the output directory before building. Defaults to true.

packages.description: Default behavior for node_modules dependencies. 'bundle' includes them in output, 'external' keeps them as imports. When omitted, tsbuild auto-selects based on platform and noExternal.

external.description: Specific dependencies to externalize (don't bundle). In tsconfig.json this must be strings (RegExp patterns are only supported via the programmatic API).

noExternal.description: Specific dependencies to bundle (overrides packages setting). In tsconfig.json this must be strings (RegExp patterns are only supported via the programmatic API).

dts.markdownDescription:
Generate TypeScript declaration files.

---
**Note**: By default, external types from `node_modules` are kept as import statements and not bundled.

entryPoints.description: Names of the project's entryPoints to be used to generate the DTS files

resolve.description: Bundle external types from node_modules into declaration files. When false, external imports remain as import statements. Defaults to false for 'node' platform, true for 'browser' and 'neutral' platforms.

env.description: Environment variables to define (accessible via import.meta.env)

minify.description: When enabled, the generated code will be minified instead of pretty-printed.

force.description: Force a full rebuild, bypassing incremental compilation cache. Useful when build artifacts are corrupted.

sourceMap.description: Generate source maps. Options: true/false, 'inline', 'external', or 'both'. Overrides tsconfig.json compilerOptions.sourceMap.

splitting.description: Enable code splitting for better caching and parallel loading

banner.description: Insert content at the beginning of generated files (e.g., shebang for CLI tools)

footer.description: Insert content at the end of generated files (e.g., copyright notices)

watch.description: Watch mode configuration (enabled via --watch CLI flag)

enabled.description: Enable watch mode. Prefer using the --watch CLI flag.

persistent.description: Keep the process running while watching.

encoding.description: Character encoding for file contents (watchr option).

renameTimeout.description: Timeout for rename events in milliseconds (watchr option).

ignore.description: Glob patterns for files to ignore during watch

plugins.markdownDescription:
Custom esbuild plugins to include in the build. Each entry is either:
- A **string** — npm package name or relative path to a plugin module (default export must be a factory function or Plugin object)
- A **tuple** `[string, object]` — module specifier with options passed to the factory function

Example:
```json
"plugins": [
  "esbuild-plugin-copy",
  ["esbuild-plugin-alias", { "aliases": { "@": "./src" } }]
]
```

oneOf.description: Plugin module specifier (npm package or relative path)
Plugin module specifier with options: [specifier, options]

prefixItems.description: Plugin module specifier (npm package or relative path)
Options passed to the plugin factory function

iife.markdownDescription:
Produce additional IIFE (Immediately Invoked Function Expression) output alongside the primary ESM build.

When enabled, each `.js` entry point is wrapped in an IIFE and written to an `iife/` subdirectory under the output directory.

Set to `true` for default behavior, or provide an object with a `globalName` to assign exports to `globalThis`.

Example:
```json
"iife": { "globalName": "MyLib" }
```

globalName.description: Global variable name for the IIFE bundle (e.g., 'MyLib' becomes globalThis.MyLib)
